system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.45, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighbors r1c4 and r3c4 are in distress; r1c4 has shown reciprocal intent by accepting my shares. I have sufficient autonomy to help without jeopardizing my own survival..
